name: daily-dubai-lottery
description: A full-featured lottery game application with admin and user roles, powered by Gemini Smart.

scripts.build: npm run clean && esbuild index.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/index.js --loader:.tsx=tsx --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp -r assets/ dist/assets/ 2>/dev/null || :
